const _loaiInStr = (v: number) => v === 1 ? 'flexo' : v === 2 ? 'ky_thuat_so' : 'khong_in'
  const _coverageStr = (v: number) => v === 1 ? '1 mặt' : v === 2 ? '2 mặt' : null
  const _loaiLanStr = (v: string | null) =>
    v === 'bang' ? 'lan_bang' : v === 'am_duong' ? 'lan_am_duong' : null

  const handleProductSelect = (_val: number, opt: unknown) => {
    const p = (opt as { record: ProductFull }).record
    giaBanManualRef.current = false
    setCI({
      product_id: p.id,
      ma_amis: p.ma_amis,
      ten_hang: p.ten_hang,
      dvt: p.dvt,
      so_lop: p.so_lop,
      ...(p.dai != null ? { dai: Number(p.dai) } : {}),
      ...(p.rong != null ? { rong: Number(p.rong) } : {}),
      ...(p.cao != null ? { cao: Number(p.cao) } : {}),
      // addon
      loai_in: _loaiInStr(p.loai_in ?? 0),
      so_mau: p.so_mau ?? 0,
      ghim: p.ghim ?? false,
      dan: p.dan ?? false,
      chap_xa: !!(p.chap_xa),
      boi: !!(p.boi),
      be_so_con: p.be_so_con ?? 0,
      c_tham: _coverageStr(p.chong_tham ?? 0),
      can_man: _coverageStr(p.can_mang ?? 0),
      loai_lan: _loaiLanStr(p.loai_lan ?? null),
      loai_thung: p.loai_thung ?? null,
      // kết cấu giấy
      mat: p.mat ?? null,       mat_dl: p.mat_dl ? Number(p.mat_dl) : null,
      song_1: p.song_1 ?? null, song_1_dl: p.song_1_dl ? Number(p.song_1_dl) : null,
      mat_1: p.mat_1 ?? null,   mat_1_dl: p.mat_1_dl ? Number(p.mat_1_dl) : null,
      song_2: p.song_2 ?? null, song_2_dl: p.song_2_dl ? Number(p.song_2_dl) : null,
      mat_2: p.mat_2 ?? null,   mat_2_dl: p.mat_2_dl ? Number(p.mat_2_dl) : null,
      song_3: p.song_3 ?? null, song_3_dl: p.song_3_dl ? Number(p.song_3_dl) : null,
      mat_3: p.mat_3 ?? null,   mat_3_dl: p.mat_3_dl ? Number(p.mat_3_dl) : null,
    })
  }
input.new_string:
const _loaiInStr = (v: number) => v === 1 ? 'flexo' : v === 2 ? 'ky_thuat_so' : 'khong_in'
  const _coverageStr = (v: number) => v === 1 ? '1 mặt' : v === 2 ? '2 mặt' : null
  const _loaiLanStr = (v: string | null) =>
    v === 'bang' ? 'lan_bang' : v === 'am_duong' ? 'lan_am_duong' : null
  const _deriveToHopSong = (p: ProductFull): string | null => {
    const parts: string[] = []
    if (p.song_1) parts.push('B')
    if (p.song_2) parts.push('C')
    if (p.song_3) parts.push('E')
    return parts.join('') || null
  }

  const handleProductSelect = (_val: number, opt: unknown) => {
    const p = (opt as { record: ProductFull }).record
    giaBanManualRef.current = false
    setCI({
      product_id: p.id,
      ma_amis: p.ma_amis,
      ten_hang: p.ten_hang,
      dvt: p.dvt,
      so_lop: p.so_lop,
      to_hop_song: _deriveToHopSong(p),
      ...(p.dai != null ? { dai: Number(p.dai) } : {}),
      ...(p.rong != null ? { rong: Number(p.rong) } : {}),
      ...(p.cao != null ? { cao: Number(p.cao) } : {}),
      // addon
      loai_in: _loaiInStr(p.loai_in ?? 0),
      so_mau: p.so_mau ?? 0,
      ghim: p.ghim ?? false,
      dan: p.dan ?? false,
      chap_xa: !!(p.chap_xa),
      boi: !!(p.boi),
      be_so_con: p.be_so_con ?? 0,
      c_tham: _coverageStr(p.chong_tham ?? 0),
      can_man: _coverageStr(p.can_mang ?? 0),
      loai_lan: _loaiLanStr(p.loai_lan ?? null),
      loai_thung: p.loai_thung ?? null,

input.command:
# Kill ANY process listening on 8001 using the socket approach
$conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
$pids = $conns.OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique
Write-Host "Current PIDs on 8001: $pids"

# Force close each socket by killing the owning processes via handle
foreach ($p in $pids) {
    Write-Host "Killing PID: $p"
    Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
    # Also try via taskkill with process name
    $proc = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$p" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
    if ($proc) { Write-Host "  -> $($proc.CommandLine)" }
}
Start-Sleep -Seconds 3

# Check again
Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
input.description: Kill all port 8001 owners and verify

const _applyProductToCI = (p: ProductFull) => {
    // Convert ma_chinh (full raw code) → ma_ky_hieu (short code dùng trong form)
    const toMk = (raw: string | null) => raw ? (rawToMk[raw] ?? raw) : null
    giaBanManualRef.current = false
    setCI({
      product_id: p.id,
      ma_amis: p.ma_amis,
      ten_hang: p.ten_hang,
      dvt: p.dvt,
      so_lop: p.so_lop,
      to_hop_song: _deriveToHopSong(p),
      ...(p.dai != null ? { dai: Number(p.dai) } : {}),
      ...(p.rong != null ? { rong: Number(p.rong) } : {}),
      ...(p.cao != null ? { cao: Number(p.cao) } : {}),
      // addon
      loai_in: _loaiInStr(p.loai_in ?? 0),
      so_mau: p.so_mau ?? 0,
      ghim: p.ghim ?? false,
      dan: p.dan ?? false,
      chap_xa: !!(p.chap_xa),
      boi: !!(p.boi),
      be_so_con: p.be_so_con ?? 0,
      c_tham: _coverageStr(p.chong_tham ?? 0),
      can_man: _coverageStr(p.can_mang ?? 0),
      loai_lan: _loaiLanStr(p.loai_lan ?? null),
      loai_thung: p.loai_thung ?? null,
      // kết cấu giấy — convert raw code → ma_ky_hieu
      mat: toMk(p.mat),         mat_dl: p.mat_dl ? Number(p.mat_dl) : null,
      song_1: toMk(p.song_1),   song_1_dl: p.song_1_dl ? Number(p.song_1_dl) : null,
      mat_1: toMk(p.mat_1),     mat_1_dl: p.mat_1_dl ? Number(p.mat_1_dl) : null,
      song_2: toMk(p.song_2),   song_2_dl: p.song_2_dl ? Number(p.song_2_dl) : null,
      mat_2: toMk(p.mat_2),     mat_2_dl: p.mat_2_dl ? Number(p.mat_2_dl) : null,
      song_3: toMk(p.song_3),   song_3_dl: p.song_3_dl ? Number(p.song_3_dl) : null,
      mat_3: toMk(p.mat_3),     mat_3_dl: p.mat_3_dl ? Number(p.mat_3_dl) : null,
      // giá từ danh mục
      ...(p.gia_ban ? { gia_ban: Number(p.gia_ban) } : {}),
    })
  }

input.content:
"""
migrate_htcph.py — Import dữ liệu từ SQL Server HTCPH vào ERP Nam Phương
Chạy: python migrate_htcph.py
- Khách hàng (DMKH → customers)
- Nhà cung cấp (DMNCC → suppliers)
- Hàng hóa (DMHH → products)
- Bỏ qua nếu đã tồn tại (upsert-skip)
"""
import sys, re, os
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor, as_completed
from decimal import Decimal

sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")

# ── Kết nối SQL Server HTCPH ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
import pyodbc

SS_CONN_STR = (
    "DRIVER={ODBC Driver 17 for SQL Server};"
    "SERVER=203.162.54.176,1441;"
    "DATABASE=HTCPH;"
    "UID=duong;"
    "PWD=Namphuong123@;"
    "TrustServerCertificate=yes;"
    "Connection Timeout=20;"
)


def ss_conn():
    return pyodbc.connect(SS_CONN_STR)


# ── Kết nối ERP (SQLAlchemy) ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Chạy từ thư mục gốc project, thêm backend vào path
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), "backend"))
os.chdir(os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), "backend"))

from app.config import settings
from app.database import SessionLocal, engine
from app import models  # noqa — register all models

Session = SessionLocal


# ── Utility ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def parse_dmhh_dims(ma_hh: str):
    """
    Tách D, R, C, so_lop từ MaHH dạng: MaKH_D*R*C_NLop
    VD: 'A&M_32*19*41_3L' → (32, 19, 41, 3)
    Trả về (None,None,None,3) nếu không parse được.
    """
    m = re.search(r"_(\d+\.?\d*)\*(\d+\.?\d*)(?:\*(\d+\.?\d*))?_(\d+)L", ma_hh)
    if m:
        d = Decimal(m.group(1))
        r = Decimal(m.group(2))
        c = Decimal(m.group(3)) if m.group(3) else Decimal("0")
        lop = int(m.group(4))
        return d, r, c, lop
    return None, None, None, 3


def ma_kh_from_ma_hh(ma_hh: str):
    """Lấy mã khách từ MaHH: 'A&M_32*19*41_3L' → 'A&M'"""
    parts = ma_hh.split("_")
    return parts[0] if parts else None


# ── 1. Migrate DMKH → customers ──────────────────────────────────────────────
def migrate_customers():
    con = ss_conn()
    cur = con.cursor()
    cur.execute("""
        SELECT MaKH, TenTat, TenKH, DiaChi, GiaoHang, MST,
               DienThoai, Fax, DaiDien, SDT_LH, NVPT,
               NoTran, soNgayNo, XepLoaiKH, isVIP, GhiChu, isHiden
        FROM DMKH
    """)
    rows = cur.fetchall()
    con.close()

    db = Session()
    try:
        existing = {r[0] for r in db.execute(
            __import__("sqlalchemy").text("SELECT ma_kh FROM customers")
        )}
        new_count = skip_count = 0
        for r in rows:
            ma_kh = (r[0] or "").strip()
            if not ma_kh or ma_kh in existing:
                skip_count += 1
                continue
            obj = models.master.Customer(
                ma_kh=ma_kh,
                ten_viet_tat=(r[1] or ma_kh).strip()[:100],
                ten_don_vi=(r[2] or "").strip() or None,
                dia_chi=(r[3] or "").strip() or None,
                dia_chi_giao_hang=(r[4] or "").strip() or None,
                ma_so_thue=(r[5] or "").strip() or None,
                dien_thoai=(r[6] or "").strip() or None,
                fax=(r[7] or "").strip() or None,
                nguoi_dai_dien=(r[8] or "").strip() or None,
                so_dien_thoai_lh=(r[9] or "").strip() or None,
                no_tran=Decimal(str(r[11])) if r[11] is not None else Decimal("0"),
                so_ngay_no=int(r[12]) if r[12] is not None else 0,
                xep_loai=(r[13] or "").strip() or None,
                la_khach_vip=bool(r[14]),
                ghi_chu=(r[15] or "").strip() or None,
                trang_thai=not bool(r[16]),  # isHiden=True → trang_thai=False
            )
            db.add(obj)
            existing.add(ma_kh)
            new_count += 1
            if new_count % 100 == 0:
                db.flush()
        db.commit()
        return f"Khách hàng: +{new_count} mới, {skip_count} bỏ qua"
    except Exception as e:
        db.rollback()
        raise e
    finally:
        db.close()


# ── 2. Migrate DMNCC → suppliers ─────────────────────────────────────────────
def migrate_suppliers():
    con = ss_conn()
    cur = con.cursor()
    cur.execute("""
        SELECT MaNCC, TenTat, TenNCC, DiaChi, MST,
               DienThoai, Fax, DaiDien, DiDong, PhanLoai, MaNCCAmis
        FROM DMNCC
    """)
    rows = cur.fetchall()
    con.close()

    db = Session()
    try:
        existing = {r[0] for r in db.execute(
            __import__("sqlalchemy").text("SELECT ma_ncc FROM suppliers")
        )}
        new_count = skip_count = 0
        for r in rows:
            ma_ncc = (r[0] or "").strip()
            if not ma_ncc or ma_ncc in existing:
                skip_count += 1
                continue
            obj = models.master.Supplier(
                ma_ncc=ma_ncc,
                ten_viet_tat=(r[1] or ma_ncc).strip()[:100],
                ten_don_vi=(r[2] or "").strip() or None,
                dia_chi=(r[3] or "").strip() or None,
                ma_so_thue=(r[4] or "").strip() or None,
                dien_thoai=(r[5] or "").strip() or None,
                fax=(r[6] or "").strip() or None,
                nguoi_dai_dien=(r[7] or "").strip() or None,
                di_dong=(r[8] or "").strip() or None,
                phan_loai=(r[9] or "").strip() or None,
                ma_ncc_amis=(r[10] or "").strip() or None,
            )
            db.add(obj)
            existing.add(ma_ncc)
            new_count += 1
        db.commit()
        return f"Nhà cung cấp: +{new_count} mới, {skip_count} bỏ qua"
    except Exception as e:
        db.rollback()
        raise e
    finally:
        db.close()


# ── 3. Migrate DMHH → products ───────────────────────────────────────────────
def migrate_products():
    con = ss_conn()
    cur = con.cursor()
    cur.execute("""
        SELECT MaHH, TenHH, DVT, GiaBan, GiaMua, GhiChu, KhongNXT, QuyCach
        FROM DMHH
    """)
    rows = cur.fetchall()
    con.close()

    db = Session()
    try:
        existing = {r[0] for r in db.execute(
            __import__("sqlalchemy").text("SELECT ma_amis FROM products")
        )}
        # Build customer map for FK
        kh_map = {r[0]: r[1] for r in db.execute(
            __import__("sqlalchemy").text("SELECT ma_kh, id FROM customers")
        )}

        new_count = skip_count = 0
        batch = []
        for r in rows:
            ma_hh = (r[0] or "").strip()
            if not ma_hh or ma_hh in existing:
                skip_count += 1
                continue

            ten_hang = (r[1] or ma_hh).strip()[:255] or ma_hh
            dvt = (r[2] or "Thùng").strip()[:20] or "Thùng"
            gia_ban = Decimal(str(r[3])) if r[3] is not None else Decimal("0")
            gia_mua = Decimal(str(r[4])) if r[4] is not None else Decimal("0")
            ghi_chu_parts = []
            if r[5]:
                ghi_chu_parts.append(r[5].strip())
            if r[7]:
                ghi_chu_parts.append(r[7].strip())
            ghi_chu = " | ".join(ghi_chu_parts) or None
            khong_tinh_nxt = bool(r[6])

            d, rong, c, so_lop = parse_dmhh_dims(ma_hh)

            # Customer FK từ prefix mã hàng
            ma_kh_prefix = ma_kh_from_ma_hh(ma_hh)
            ma_kh_id = kh_map.get(ma_kh_prefix)

            obj = models.master.Product(
                ma_amis=ma_hh,
                ma_hang=ma_hh,
                ten_hang=ten_hang,
                dai=d,
                rong=rong,
                cao=c,
                so_lop=so_lop,
                dvt=dvt,
                gia_ban=gia_ban,
                gia_mua=gia_mua,
                ghi_chu=ghi_chu,
                khong_tinh_nxt=khong_tinh_nxt,
                ma_kh_id=ma_kh_id,
            )
            batch.append(obj)
            existing.add(ma_hh)
            new_count += 1
            if len(batch) >= 500:
                db.add_all(batch)
                db.flush()
                batch.clear()
                print(f"  ... {new_count} hàng hóa đã xử lý", flush=True)

        if batch:
            db.add_all(batch)
        db.commit()
        return f"Hàng hóa: +{new_count} mới, {skip_count} bỏ qua"
    except Exception as e:
        db.rollback()
        raise e
    finally:
        db.close()


# ── Main: chạy 3 jobs song song ───────────────────────────────────────────────
if __name__ == "__main__":
    print("=== Migrate HTCPH → ERP Nam Phương ===\n")

    jobs = {
        "customers": migrate_customers,
        "suppliers": migrate_suppliers,
        "products": migrate_products,
    }

    # customers và suppliers trước (products cần customer FK)
    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=2) as exe:
        futures = {
            exe.submit(migrate_customers): "customers",
            exe.submit(migrate_suppliers): "suppliers",
        }
        for f in as_completed(futures):
            name = futures[f]
            try:
                print(f"✓ {f.result()}")
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"✗ {name}: {e}")

    # products sau (cần customer FK map)
    print("\nĐang migrate hàng hóa...")
    try:
        result = migrate_products()
        print(f"✓ {result}")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"✗ products: {e}")

    print("\n=== Hoàn thành ===")

  h.MaHH,
  COUNT(DISTINCT dt.DTBGID) as so_bao_gia
FROM DMHH h
JOIN MTBaoGia mb ON mb.MaKH = LEFT(h.MaHH, CHARINDEX(\'_\', h.MaHH) - 1)
JOIN DTBaoGia dt ON dt.MTBGID = mb.MTBGID
  AND ABS(dt.Dai - CAST(PARSENAME(REPLACE(SUBSTRING(h.MaHH, 
    CHARINDEX(\'_\', h.MaHH)+1, 
    LEN(h.MaHH)-CHARINDEX(\'_\', h.MaHH)-2), \'*\', \'.\'), 3) AS FLOAT)) < 0.5
WHERE h.MaHH LIKE \'%_%\_%\'

HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT dt.DTBGID) > 0
ORDER BY so_bao_gia DESC
''')

import sys, pyodbc
sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8')
conn = pyodbc.connect('DRIVER={ODBC Driver 17 for SQL Server};SERVER=203.162.54.176,1441;DATABASE=HTCPH;UID=duong;PWD=Namphuong123@;TrustServerCertificate=yes;Connection Timeout=20')
cur = conn.cursor()

# Lấy toàn bộ DMHH đã parse được dimension
import re
cur.execute('SELECT MaHH FROM DMHH')
products = [r[0] for r in cur.fetchall() if r[0]]

parsed = []
for mhh in products:
    m = re.search(r'^([^_]+)_(\d+\.?\d*)\*(\d+\.?\d*)(?:\*(\d+\.?\d*))?_(\d+)L', mhh)
    if m:
        parsed.append((mhh, m.group(1), float(m.group(2)), float(m.group(3)), 
                       float(m.group(4) or 0), int(m.group(5))))

print(f'DMHH có dims: {len(parsed)}/{len(products)}')

# Lấy DTBaoGia + MTBaoGia join
cur.execute('''
SELECT mb.MaKH, dt.Dai, dt.Rong, dt.Cao, dt.Lop,
       dt.KetCau, dt.Mat_Giay, dt.SB_Giay, dt.MB_Giay, dt.SC_Giay, dt.MC_Giay,
       dt.SE_Giay, dt.ME_Giay,
       dt.Mat_DL, dt.SB_DL, dt.MB_DL, dt.SC_DL, dt.MC_DL,
       dt.isChongTham, dt.LoaiIn, dt.isBoi, dt.isBe, dt.isCanMan,
       mb.NgayCT
FROM DTBaoGia dt
JOIN MTBaoGia mb ON mb.MTBGID = dt.MTBGID
WHERE dt.Dai IS NOT NULL AND dt.Rong IS NOT NULL AND mb.MaKH IS NOT NULL
      AND dt.Mat_Giay IS NOT NULL AND dt.Mat_Giay != \'\'
ORDER BY mb.NgayCT DESC
''')
bg_cols = [c[0] for c in cur.description]
bg_rows = cur.fetchall()
print(f'DTBaoGia có kết cấu: {len(bg_rows)}')

# Build lookup: (MaKH, Dai, Rong, Cao, Lop) → latest row
lookup = {}
for row in reversed(bg_rows):  # reversed = oldest first, latest overwrites
    d = dict(zip(bg_cols, row))
    key = (d['MaKH'], round(d['Dai'] or 0, 1), round(d['Rong'] or 0, 1), 
           round(d['Cao'] or 0, 1), d['Lop'] or 3)
    lookup[key] = d

# Match
matched = 0
for mhh, makh, dai, rong, cao, lop in parsed:
    key = (makh, round(dai, 1), round(rong, 1), round(cao, 1), lop)
    if key in lookup:
        matched += 1

print(f'Products matched: {matched}/{len(parsed)} ({matched*100//len(parsed) if parsed else 0}%)')
conn.close()
" 2>&1

input.content:
"""
migrate_ket_cau.py — Link hàng hóa với kết cấu giấy từ lịch sử báo giá HTCPH

Logic:
  DMHH.MaHH (A&M_32*19*41_3L)
    → MaKH prefix = "A&M"
    → MTBaoGia.MaKH = "A&M" (lấy báo giá gần nhất)
    → DTBaoGia.Dai=32, Rong=19, Cao=41, Lop=3
    → kết cấu giấy + addon

Output:
  1. CauTrucThongDung — populate các kết cấu distinct từ DTBaoGia
  2. Product.so_mau, ghim, dan — update từ DTBaoGia match
"""
import sys, re, os
sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")

import pyodbc
from decimal import Decimal

sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), "backend"))
os.chdir(os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), "backend"))

from app.database import SessionLocal
from app.models.master import CauTrucThongDung, Product
import sqlalchemy as sa

SS_CONN_STR = (
    "DRIVER={ODBC Driver 17 for SQL Server};"
    "SERVER=203.162.54.176,1441;"
    "DATABASE=HTCPH;"
    "UID=duong;"
    "PWD=Namphuong123@;"
    "TrustServerCertificate=yes;"
    "Connection Timeout=20;"
)


def clean(v, maxlen=None):
    if v is None:
        return None
    s = str(v).strip()
    if not s:
        return None
    return s[:maxlen] if maxlen else s


def parse_mhh(mhh: str):
    """
    'A&M_32*19*41_3L' → ('A&M', 32.0, 19.0, 41.0, 3)
    'AAP_120*120_3L'  → ('AAP', 120.0, 120.0, 0.0, 3)
    """
    m = re.search(r'^([^_]+)_(\d+\.?\d*)\*(\d+\.?\d*)(?:\*(\d+\.?\d*))?_(\d+)L', mhh)
    if not m:
        return None
    return (
        m.group(1),
        float(m.group(2)),
        float(m.group(3)),
        float(m.group(4) or 0),
        int(m.group(5)),
    )


def to_hop_song_from_ketcau(lop: int, sb: str, sc: str, se: str) -> str | None:
    """Đoán tổ hợp sóng từ các cột sóng."""
    parts = []
    if sb:
        parts.append("B")
    if sc:
        parts.append("C")
    if se:
        parts.append("E")
    return "".join(parts) or None


# ── Fetch từ SQL Server ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
print("Kết nối SQL Server...")
conn = pyodbc.connect(SS_CONN_STR)
cur = conn.cursor()

# 1. DMHH
cur.execute("SELECT MaHH FROM DMHH WHERE MaHH IS NOT NULL")
all_mahh = [r[0].strip() for r in cur.fetchall() if r[0]]

# 2. DTBaoGia + MTBaoGia — chỉ lấy dòng có kết cấu
cur.execute("""
    SELECT
        mb.MaKH,
        dt.Dai, dt.Rong, dt.Cao, dt.Lop,
        dt.KetCau,
        dt.Mat_Giay,  dt.SB_Giay,  dt.MB_Giay,
        dt.SC_Giay,   dt.MC_Giay,
        dt.SE_Giay,   dt.ME_Giay,
        dt.Mat_DL,    dt.SB_DL,    dt.MB_DL,
        dt.SC_DL,     dt.MC_DL,
        dt.Ghim, dt.Dan, dt.LoaiIn, dt.isBoi, dt.isBe, dt.isCanMan, dt.isChongTham,
        mb.NgayCT
    FROM DTBaoGia dt
    JOIN MTBaoGia mb ON mb.MTBGID = dt.MTBGID
    WHERE dt.Dai IS NOT NULL AND dt.Rong IS NOT NULL
      AND mb.MaKH IS NOT NULL
      AND dt.Mat_Giay IS NOT NULL AND dt.Mat_Giay != ''
    ORDER BY mb.NgayCT ASC
""")
cols = [c[0] for c in cur.description]
bg_rows = [dict(zip(cols, r)) for r in cur.fetchall()]
conn.close()

print(f"DMHH: {len(all_mahh)} | DTBaoGia có kết cấu: {len(bg_rows)}")

# ── Build lookup (MaKH, Dai, Rong, Cao, Lop) → latest DTBaoGia row ──────────
# ORDER BY NgayCT ASC rồi overwrite → key cuối = mới nhất
lookup: dict[tuple, dict] = {}
for row in bg_rows:
    key = (
        (row["MaKH"] or "").strip(),
        round(row["Dai"] or 0, 1),
        round(row["Rong"] or 0, 1),
        round(row["Cao"] or 0, 1),
        int(row["Lop"] or 3),
    )
    lookup[key] = row

# ── Parse DMHH ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
parsed_products: list[tuple] = []  # (MaHH, MaKH, Dai, Rong, Cao, Lop)
for mhh in all_mahh:
    p = parse_mhh(mhh)
    if p:
        parsed_products.append((mhh,) + p)

print(f"DMHH parse được dims: {len(parsed_products)}/{len(all_mahh)}")

# Match
matches: dict[str, dict] = {}  # MaHH → DTBaoGia row
for mhh, makh, dai, rong, cao, lop in parsed_products:
    key = (makh, round(dai, 1), round(rong, 1), round(cao, 1), lop)
    if key in lookup:
        matches[mhh] = lookup[key]

print(f"Matched: {len(matches)}/{len(parsed_products)} ({len(matches)*100//len(parsed_products) if parsed_products else 0}%)")


# ── Step 1: Populate CauTrucThongDung ────────────────────────────────────────
# Dedup bằng (KetCau, so_lop) — lấy 1 record đại diện
unique_cau_truc: dict[tuple, dict] = {}
for mhh, row in matches.items():
    ketcau = clean(row["KetCau"], 100)
    lop = int(row["Lop"] or 3)
    key = (ketcau or "", lop)
    if key not in unique_cau_truc:
        unique_cau_truc[key] = row

print(f"\nCấu trúc distinct: {len(unique_cau_truc)}")

db = SessionLocal()
try:
    existing_ct = {
        (r[0], r[1])
        for r in db.execute(
            sa.text("SELECT ten_cau_truc, so_lop FROM cau_truc_thong_dung")
        )
    }
    ct_new = 0
    for (ketcau_str, lop), row in unique_cau_truc.items():
        if not ketcau_str:
            continue
        if (ketcau_str, lop) in existing_ct:
            continue
        to_hop = to_hop_song_from_ketcau(
            lop,
            row.get("SB_Giay") or "",
            row.get("SC_Giay") or "",
            row.get("SE_Giay") or "",
        )
        obj = CauTrucThongDung(
            ten_cau_truc=ketcau_str,
            so_lop=lop,
            to_hop_song=to_hop,
            mat=clean(row.get("Mat_Giay"), 30),
            mat_dl=Decimal(str(row["Mat_DL"])) if row.get("Mat_DL") else None,
            song_1=clean(row.get("SB_Giay"), 30),
            song_1_dl=Decimal(str(row["SB_DL"])) if row.get("SB_DL") else None,
            mat_1=clean(row.get("MB_Giay"), 30),
            mat_1_dl=Decimal(str(row["MB_DL"])) if row.get("MB_DL") else None,
            song_2=clean(row.get("SC_Giay"), 30),
            song_2_dl=Decimal(str(row["SC_DL"])) if row.get("SC_DL") else None,
            mat_2=clean(row.get("MC_Giay"), 30),
            mat_2_dl=Decimal(str(row["MC_DL"])) if row.get("MC_DL") else None,
            song_3=None,
            song_3_dl=None,
            mat_3=None,
            mat_3_dl=None,
            trang_thai=True,
            thu_tu=ct_new,
        )
        db.add(obj)
        existing_ct.add((ketcau_str, lop))
        ct_new += 1

    db.flush()
    # Reload map: (ten_cau_truc, so_lop) → id
    ct_id_map = {
        (r[0], r[1]): r[2]
        for r in db.execute(
            sa.text("SELECT ten_cau_truc, so_lop, id FROM cau_truc_thong_dung")
        )
    }
    print(f"CauTrucThongDung: +{ct_new} mới")

    # ── Step 2: Update products (so_mau, ghim, dan + ghi_chu KetCau) ─────────
    prod_map = {
        r[0]: r[1]
        for r in db.execute(sa.text("SELECT ma_amis, id FROM products"))
    }

    updated = 0
    for mhh, row in matches.items():
        prod_id = prod_map.get(mhh)
        if not prod_id:
            continue

        loai_in = int(row.get("LoaiIn") or 0)
        ghim = bool(row.get("Ghim"))
        dan = bool(row.get("Dan"))
        ketcau_str = clean(row.get("KetCau"))

        db.execute(
            sa.text("""
                UPDATE products
                SET so_mau = :so_mau,
                    ghim   = :ghim,
                    dan    = :dan,
                    ghi_chu = CASE
                        WHEN ghi_chu IS NULL OR ghi_chu = '' THEN :ketcau
                        ELSE ghi_chu || ' | KetCau: ' || :ketcau
                    END
                WHERE id = :id
            """),
            {
                "so_mau": loai_in,
                "ghim": ghim,
                "dan": dan,
                "ketcau": ketcau_str or "",
                "id": prod_id,
            },
        )
        updated += 1
        if updated % 1000 == 0:
            print(f"  ... {updated} sản phẩm cập nhật")

    db.commit()
    print(f"Products updated: {updated}")
    print("\n=== Hoàn thành ===")

except Exception as e:
    db.rollback()
    raise
finally:
    db.close()

cd "d:\NAM_PHUONG_SOFTWARE\DU LIEU MPS\erp-nam-phuong" && python -c "
import sys, re, os, pyodbc
sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8')
sys.path.insert(0, 'backend'); os.chdir('backend')
from app.database import SessionLocal
import sqlalchemy as sa

# Normalize helpers
def norm_chong_tham(v):
    if not v: return 0
    v = str(v).strip()
    if v in ('Không','0',''): return 0
    if v in ('Trong','1'): return 1
    if v in ('Ngoài','Ngoai','2','2 Mặt'): return 2
    return 0

def norm_can_mang(v):
    return norm_chong_tham(v)

# SQL Server
conn = pyodbc.connect('DRIVER={ODBC Driver 17 for SQL Server};SERVER=203.162.54.176,1441;DATABASE=HTCPH;UID=duong;PWD=Namphuong123@;TrustServerCertificate=yes;Connection Timeout=20')
cur = conn.cursor()
cur.execute('''
    SELECT mb.MaKH, dt.Dai, dt.Rong, dt.Cao, dt.Lop,
           dt.isChongTham, dt.isBoi, dt.isBe, dt.isCanMan, dt.LoaiIn, dt.Ghim, dt.Dan,
           mb.NgayCT
    FROM DTBaoGia dt
    JOIN MTBaoGia mb ON mb.MTBGID = dt.MTBGID
    WHERE dt.Dai IS NOT NULL AND mb.MaKH IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY mb.NgayCT ASC
''')
cols = [c[0] for c in cur.description]
bg_rows = [dict(zip(cols, r)) for r in cur.fetchall()]
conn.close()

# Build lookup latest per (MaKH, D, R, C, Lop)
lookup = {}
for row in bg_rows:
    key = ((row['MaKH'] or '').strip(), round(row['Dai'] or 0,1),
           round(row['Rong'] or 0,1), round(row['Cao'] or 0,1), int(row['Lop'] or 3))
    lookup[key] = row

# Parse products
import re as _re
def parse(mhh):
    m = _re.search(r'^([^_]+)_(\d+\.?\d*)\*(\d+\.?\d*)(?:\*(\d+\.?\d*))?_(\d+)L', mhh)
    if not m: return None
    return m.group(1), float(m.group(2)), float(m.group(3)), float(m.group(4) or 0), int(m.group(5))

db = SessionLocal()
prod_map = {r[0]: r[1] for r in db.execute(sa.text('SELECT ma_amis, id FROM products'))}
updated = 0
for mhh, pid in prod_map.items():
    p = parse(mhh)
    if not p: continue
    key = (p[0], round(p[1],1), round(p[2],1), round(p[3],1), p[4])
    row = lookup.get(key)
    if not row: continue
    db.execute(sa.text('''
        UPDATE products SET
          chong_tham = :ct, boi = :boi, be_so_con = :be, can_mang = :cm
        WHERE id = :id
    '''), {
        'ct':  norm_chong_tham(row['isChongTham']),
        'boi': 1 if row['isBoi'] else 0,
        'be':  int(row['isBe'] or 0),
        'cm':  norm_can_mang(row['isCanMan']),
        'id':  pid,
    })
    updated += 1
    if updated % 2000 == 0:
        db.flush()
        print(f'  {updated} updated...')
db.commit()
print(f'Addon updated: {updated} products')

# Verify
sample = db.execute(sa.text('''
    SELECT ma_amis, so_mau, ghim, dan, chong_tham, boi, be_so_con, can_mang
    FROM products WHERE chong_tham > 0 OR boi > 0 OR be_so_con > 0 OR can_mang > 0
    LIMIT 5
''')).fetchall()
print('Sample:')
for r in sample: print(' ', r)
db.close()
" 2>&1
input.description: Update all 4 missing addon columns from DTBaoGia matches

input.prompt:
Write `d:\NAM_PHUONG_SOFTWARE\DU LIEU MPS\erp-nam-phuong\backend\app\services\htcph_sync.py`.

This is a sync service that pulls product master data from SQL Server HTCPH into the FastAPI ERP.

## Context
- ERP: FastAPI + PostgreSQL, SQLAlchemy
- HTCPH: SQL Server 203.162.54.176,1441, user=duong, pw=Namphuong123@, db=HTCPH
- pyodbc available for SQL Server connection
- Products table has columns: ma_amis (unique), ma_hang, ten_hang, dai, rong, cao, so_lop, so_mau, loai_in, ghim, dan, chap_xa, loai_lan, loai_thung, chong_tham, boi, be_so_con, can_mang, dvt, loai, ma_kh_id, gia_ban, gia_mua, ghi_chu, trang_thai
- CauTrucThongDung table: ten_cau_truc, so_lop, to_hop_song, mat, mat_dl, song_1, song_1_dl, mat_1, mat_1_dl, song_2, song_2_dl, mat_2, mat_2_dl, song_3, song_3_dl, mat_3, mat_3_dl
- ImportLog table: loai_du_lieu, ten_nguoi_import, so_dong_thanh_cong, so_dong_loi, so_dong_bo_qua, trang_thai, chi_tiet_loi, thoi_gian

## What the sync does
1. Connect to HTCPH via pyodbc (run in executor thread — pyodbc is not async)
2. Pull all DMHH: MaHH, TenHH, DVT, GiaBan, GiaMua, KhongNXT, Loai
3. Pull latest DTBaoGia per product via: MTBaoGia.MaKH + DTBaoGia.(Dai,Rong,Cao,Lop) matching DMHH parsed dimensions. Take most recent NgayCT. Columns needed: Mat_Giay, SB_Giay, MB_Giay, SC_Giay, MC_Giay, SE_Giay, ME_Giay, Mat_DL, SB_DL, MB_DL, SC_DL, MC_DL, SoMau, LoaiIn, CHAPXA, Lan, LoaiThung, isChongTham, isBoi, isBe, isCanMan, Ghim, Dan
4. Upsert products: INSERT new ones, UPDATE existing if gia_ban/kết_cấu/addon changed
5. Upsert CauTrucThongDung: insert new distinct paper structures (dedup key: so_lop+mat+song_1+mat_1+song_2+mat_2+song_3+mat_3)
6. Log to import_logs table

## Key logic from previous migration scripts

Parse MaHH: `^([^_]+)_(\d+\.?\d*)\*(\d+\.?\d*)(?:\*(\d+\.?\d*))?_(\d+)L`
- group 1 = MaKH prefix
- groups 2,3,4 = D,R,C dimensions
- group 5 = Lop

Lookup key for DTBaoGia: (MaKH, round(Dai,1), round(Rong,1), round(Cao,1), Lop) → latest row

Normalize functions:
- loai_lan: '+ 0' → 'bang', '+ -' → 'am_duong'
- chong_tham/can_mang: 'Không'→0, 'Trong'→1, 'Ngoài'/'2 Mặt'/'2'→2
- so_mau from SoMau (int, min 0), loai_in from LoaiIn (int)
- chap_xa: bool(CHAPXA) → int 0/1

## Service structure

```python
import asyncio, logging, re
from datetime import datetime
from decimal import Decimal
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor

logger = logging.getLogger("erp.htcph_sync")
_executor = ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=2)

SS_CONN_STR = "DRIVER={ODBC Driver 17 for SQL Server};SERVER=203.162.54.176,1441;DATABASE=HTCPH;UID=duong;PWD=Namphuong123@;TrustServerCertificate=yes;Connection Timeout=20;"

async def sync_products(db: Session) -> dict:
    """Pull DMHH + DTBaoGia from HTCPH, upsert products + CauTrucThongDung. Returns stats dict."""
    loop = asyncio.get_event_loop()
    htcph_data = await loop.run_in_executor(_executor, _fetch_htcph)
    result = await loop.run_in_executor(_executor, _upsert, db, htcph_data)
    return result

def _fetch_htcph() -> dict:
    """Synchronous: connect to SQL Server and pull all needed data."""
    # returns {"dmhh": [...], "bg_lookup": {key: row}}

def _upsert(db, htcph_data) -> dict:
    """Synchronous: upsert products and cau_truc, return stats."""
    # stats = {"new": 0, "updated": 0, "skipped": 0, "errors": 0}

async def run_daily_sync(get_db_func):
    """Background loop: sleep until next 02:00, then sync."""
    while True:
        now = datetime.now()
        next_run = now.replace(hour=2, minute=0, second=0, microsecond=0)
        if next_run <= now:
            next_run = next_run.replace(day=now.day + 1)
        wait_sec = (next_run - now).total_seconds()
        logger.info(f"HTCPH sync: next run in {wait_sec/3600:.1f}h at {next_run}")
        await asyncio.sleep(wait_sec)
        db = next(get_db_func())
        try:
            result = await sync_products(db)
            logger.info(f"HTCPH sync done: {result}")
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"HTCPH sync failed: {e}")
        finally:
            db.close()
```

## Important
- Products.ghim and .dan are PostgreSQL BOOLEAN — pass Python bool, not int
- CauTrucThongDung upsert: skip if same (so_lop, mat, song_1, mat_1, song_2, mat_2, song_3, mat_3) already exists
- Detect changed products by comparing gia_ban (Decimal), mat, song_1, mat_1 from existing DB vs new HTCPH data — only update if something changed
- Write clean production code, no debug prints, use logger
- Imports: use `from app.models.master import Product, CauTrucThongDung, Customer` and `from app.models.import_log import ImportLog`
- DB session is passed in (not created inside service)
- `_upsert` must do db.commit() at end

This is a FastAPI router that exposes manual trigger for HTCPH sync and sync status.

## Context
- ERP: FastAPI + PostgreSQL
- Pattern from existing routers: use `from app.deps import get_current_user, get_admin_user` and `from app.database import get_db`
- Import log model: `from app.models.import_log import ImportLog`
- Sync service: `from app.services.htcph_sync import sync_products`

## Endpoints

### POST /api/sync-htcph/products
- Auth: admin only (Depends(get_admin_user))
- Runs sync_products(db) 
- Returns: {"status": "ok", "result": {new, updated, skipped, errors}}
- On error: return 500 with detail

### GET /api/sync-htcph/logs
- Auth: any logged-in user (Depends(get_current_user))
- Returns last 10 import_logs where loai_du_lieu='htcph_products', ordered by thoi_gian DESC
- Returns list of dicts via .to_dict()

### GET /api/sync-htcph/status  
- Auth: any logged-in user
- Returns last sync info: last run time, result stats from latest import_log
- If no log exists: {"last_sync": null, "status": "never"}

## Router setup
```python
router = APIRouter(prefix="/api/sync-htcph", tags=["Sync HTCPH"])
```

Write clean, minimal code. No unnecessary abstractions.

    _gps_task = asyncio.create_task(gps_poller_loop())

# We pick the most recent NgayCT row per MaHH.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
_BG_SQL = """
SELECT
    d.MaHH,
    d.Mat_Giay,
    d.SB_Giay,  d.MB_Giay,
    d.SC_Giay,  d.MC_Giay,
    d.SE_Giay,  d.ME_Giay,
    d.Mat_DL,
    d.SB_DL,    d.MB_DL,
    d.SC_DL,    d.MC_DL,
    d.SoMau,
    d.LoaiIn,
    d.CHAPXA,
    d.Lan,
    d.LoaiThung,
    d.isChongTham,
    d.isBoi,
    d.isBe,
    d.isCanMan,
    d.Ghim,
    d.Dan,
    m.MaKH,
    m.NgayCT
FROM DTBaoGia d
INNER JOIN MTBaoGia m ON m.SoBG = d.SoBG
WHERE d.MaHH IS NOT NULL
  AND m.NgayCT = (
      SELECT MAX(m2.NgayCT)
      FROM DTBaoGia d2
      INNER JOIN MTBaoGia m2 ON m2.SoBG = d2.SoBG
      WHERE d2.MaHH = d.MaHH
  )
"""


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Internal: fetch from HTCPH (synchronous — runs in executor thread)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def _fetch_htcph() -> dict[str, Any]:
    """
    Returns:
        {
            "dmhh":      [row_dict, ...],
            "bg_lookup": {MaHH: row_dict},   # keyed by MaHH string
        }
    """
    logger.info("HTCPH fetch: connecting to SQL Server…")
    conn = pyodbc.connect(_SS_CONN_STR)
    try:
        cur = conn.cursor()

        # --- DMHH ---------------------------------------------------------
        cur.execute(_DMHH_SQL)
        cols_dmhh = [c[0] for c in cur.description]
        dmhh_rows = [dict(zip(cols_dmhh, row)) for row in cur.fetchall()]
        logger.info("HTCPH fetch: %d DMHH rows", len(dmhh_rows))

        # --- DTBaoGia (latest per product) --------------------------------
        cur.execute(_BG_SQL)
        cols_bg = [c[0] for c in cur.description]
        bg_lookup: dict[str, dict] = {}
        for row in cur.fetchall():
            d = dict(zip(cols_bg, row))
            ma_hh = d["MaHH"]
            # Already filtered to latest NgayCT by sub-query, but keep latest
            # in case of ties at the Python level too.
            existing = bg_lookup.get(ma_hh)
            if existing is None or (d.get("NgayCT") or datetime.min) > (existing.get("NgayCT") or datetime.min):
                bg_lookup[ma_hh] = d

        logger.info("HTCPH fetch: %d DTBaoGia rows (distinct MaHH)", len(bg_lookup))
        return {"dmhh": dmhh_rows, "bg_lookup": bg_lookup}

    finally:
        conn.close()
input.new_string:
# DTBaoGia không có MaHH FK (luôn NULL). Match bằng:
# (MTBaoGia.MaKH, round(Dai,1), round(Rong,1), round(Cao,1), Lop) → latest row
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
_BG_SQL = """
SELECT
    mb.MaKH,
    dt.Dai, dt.Rong, dt.Cao, dt.Lop,
    dt.Mat_Giay,
    dt.SB_Giay,  dt.MB_Giay,
    dt.SC_Giay,  dt.MC_Giay,
    dt.SE_Giay,  dt.ME_Giay,
    dt.Mat_DL,
    dt.SB_DL,    dt.MB_DL,
    dt.SC_DL,    dt.MC_DL,
    dt.SoMau, dt.LoaiIn, dt.CHAPXA, dt.Lan, dt.LoaiThung,
    dt.isChongTham, dt.isBoi, dt.isBe, dt.isCanMan, dt.Ghim, dt.Dan,
    mb.NgayCT
FROM DTBaoGia dt
INNER JOIN MTBaoGia mb ON mb.MTBGID = dt.MTBGID
WHERE dt.Dai IS NOT NULL AND mb.MaKH IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY mb.NgayCT ASC
"""


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Internal: fetch from HTCPH (synchronous — runs in executor thread)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def _fetch_htcph() -> dict[str, Any]:
    """
    Returns:
        {
            "dmhh":      [row_dict, ...],
            "bg_lookup": {(MaKH,D,R,C,Lop): row_dict},  # latest per key
        }
    """
    logger.info("HTCPH fetch: connecting to SQL Server…")
    conn = pyodbc.connect(_SS_CONN_STR)
    try:
        cur = conn.cursor()

        # --- DMHH ---------------------------------------------------------
        cur.execute(_DMHH_SQL)
        cols_dmhh = [c[0] for c in cur.description]
        dmhh_rows = [dict(zip(cols_dmhh, row)) for row in cur.fetchall()]
        logger.info("HTCPH fetch: %d DMHH rows", len(dmhh_rows))

        # --- DTBaoGia: ORDER BY NgayCT ASC → latest overwrites older ------
        cur.execute(_BG_SQL)
        cols_bg = [c[0] for c in cur.description]
        bg_lookup: dict[tuple, dict] = {}
        for row in cur.fetchall():
            d = dict(zip(cols_bg, row))
            key = (
                (d["MaKH"] or "").strip(),
                round(float(d["Dai"] or 0), 1),
                round(float(d["Rong"] or 0), 1),
                round(float(d["Cao"] or 0), 1),
                int(d["Lop"] or 3),
            )
            bg_lookup[key] = d  # latest wins (ORDER BY ASC)

        logger.info("HTCPH fetch: %d DTBaoGia distinct keys", len(bg_lookup))
        return {"dmhh": dmhh_rows, "bg_lookup": bg_lookup}

    finally:
        conn.close()

input.new_string:
const _loaiInStr = (v: number) => v === 1 ? 'flexo' : v === 2 ? 'ky_thuat_so' : 'khong_in'
  const _coverageStr = (v: number) => v === 1 ? '1 mặt' : v === 2 ? '2 mặt' : null
  const _loaiLanStr = (v: string | null) =>
    v === 'bang' ? 'lan_bang' : v === 'am_duong' ? 'lan_am_duong' : null
  const _deriveToHopSong = (p: ProductFull): string | null => {
    const parts: string[] = []
    if (p.song_1) parts.push('B')
    if (p.song_2) parts.push('C')
    if (p.song_3) parts.push('E')
    return parts.join('') || null
  }

  const handleProductSelect = (_val: number, opt: unknown) => {
    const p = (opt as { record: ProductFull }).record
    giaBanManualRef.current = false
    setCI({
      product_id: p.id,
      ma_amis: p.ma_amis,
      ten_hang: p.ten_hang,
      dvt: p.dvt,
      so_lop: p.so_lop,
      to_hop_song: _deriveToHopSong(p),
      ...(p.dai != null ? { dai: Number(p.dai) } : {}),
      ...(p.rong != null ? { rong: Number(p.rong) } : {}),
      ...(p.cao != null ? { cao: Number(p.cao) } : {}),
      // addon
      loai_in: _loaiInStr(p.loai_in ?? 0),
      so_mau: p.so_mau ?? 0,
      ghim: p.ghim ?? false,
      dan: p.dan ?? false,
      chap_xa: !!(p.chap_xa),
      boi: !!(p.boi),
      be_so_con: p.be_so_con ?? 0,
      c_tham: _coverageStr(p.chong_tham ?? 0),
      can_man: _coverageStr(p.can_mang ?? 0),
      loai_lan: _loaiLanStr(p.loai_lan ?? null),
      loai_thung: p.loai_thung ?? null,
      // kết cấu giấy
      mat: p.mat ?? null,       mat_dl: p.mat_dl ? Number(p.mat_dl) : null,
      song_1: p.song_1 ?? null, song_1_dl: p.song_1_dl ? Number(p.song_1_dl) : null,
      mat_1: p.mat_1 ?? null,   mat_1_dl: p.mat_1_dl ? Number(p.mat_1_dl) : null,
      song_2: p.song_2 ?? null, song_2_dl: p.song_2_dl ? Number(p.song_2_dl) : null,
      mat_2: p.mat_2 ?? null,   mat_2_dl: p.mat_2_dl ? Number(p.mat_2_dl) : null,
      song_3: p.song_3 ?? null, song_3_dl: p.song_3_dl ? Number(p.song_3_dl) : null,
      mat_3: p.mat_3 ?? null,   mat_3_dl: p.mat_3_dl ? Number(p.mat_3_dl) : null,
    })
  }

# Kill ANY process listening on 8001 using the socket approach
$conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
$pids = $conns.OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique
Write-Host "Current PIDs on 8001: $pids"

# Force close each socket by killing the owning processes via handle
foreach ($p in $pids) {
    Write-Host "Killing PID: $p"
    Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
    # Also try via taskkill with process name
    $proc = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$p" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
    if ($proc) { Write-Host "  -> $($proc.CommandLine)" }
}
Start-Sleep -Seconds 3

# Check again
Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

const _applyProductToCI = (p: ProductFull) => {
    // Convert ma_chinh (full raw code) → ma_ky_hieu (short code dùng trong form)
    const toMk = (raw: string | null) => raw ? (rawToMk[raw] ?? raw) : null
    giaBanManualRef.current = false
    setCI({
      product_id: p.id,
      ma_amis: p.ma_amis,
      ten_hang: p.ten_hang,
      dvt: p.dvt,
      so_lop: p.so_lop,
      to_hop_song: _deriveToHopSong(p),
      ...(p.dai != null ? { dai: Number(p.dai) } : {}),
      ...(p.rong != null ? { rong: Number(p.rong) } : {}),
      ...(p.cao != null ? { cao: Number(p.cao) } : {}),
      // addon
      loai_in: _loaiInStr(p.loai_in ?? 0),
      so_mau: p.so_mau ?? 0,
      ghim: p.ghim ?? false,
      dan: p.dan ?? false,
      chap_xa: !!(p.chap_xa),
      boi: !!(p.boi),
      be_so_con: p.be_so_con ?? 0,
      c_tham: _coverageStr(p.chong_tham ?? 0),
      can_man: _coverageStr(p.can_mang ?? 0),
      loai_lan: _loaiLanStr(p.loai_lan ?? null),
      loai_thung: p.loai_thung ?? null,
      // kết cấu giấy — convert raw code → ma_ky_hieu
      mat: toMk(p.mat),         mat_dl: p.mat_dl ? Number(p.mat_dl) : null,
      song_1: toMk(p.song_1),   song_1_dl: p.song_1_dl ? Number(p.song_1_dl) : null,
      mat_1: toMk(p.mat_1),     mat_1_dl: p.mat_1_dl ? Number(p.mat_1_dl) : null,
      song_2: toMk(p.song_2),   song_2_dl: p.song_2_dl ? Number(p.song_2_dl) : null,
      mat_2: toMk(p.mat_2),     mat_2_dl: p.mat_2_dl ? Number(p.mat_2_dl) : null,
      song_3: toMk(p.song_3),   song_3_dl: p.song_3_dl ? Number(p.song_3_dl) : null,
      mat_3: toMk(p.mat_3),     mat_3_dl: p.mat_3_dl ? Number(p.mat_3_dl) : null,
      // giá từ danh mục
      ...(p.gia_ban ? { gia_ban: Number(p.gia_ban) } : {}),
    })
  }

input.content:
---
task: Thêm loai_thung vào ProductList form để QuoteForm auto-fill khi chọn mã
slug: product-loai-thung
effort: E3
phase: observe
progress: 0/12
mode: ALGORITHM
started: 2026-06-02T14:00:00Z
updated: 2026-06-02T14:00:00Z
---

## Problem
ProductList.tsx hardcode `loai_thung: null` khi tạo/update sản phẩm. Khi QuoteForm load sản phẩm từ danh mục, `_applyProductToCI` thấy `p.loai_thung = null` → không override → `boxCalc = null` → row kích thước không hiện và Khổ TT/Dài TT không tự tính.

## Vision
Người dùng mở ProductList, chọn loại thùng (A1/A3/...) khi tạo/sửa sản phẩm. Khi QuoteForm load mã đó, `loai_thung` tự điền → 3 trường Khổ TT/Dài TT/Diện tích tự tính ngay → row kích thước hiện ra.

## Out of Scope
- Không sửa công thức calcBoxDimensions
- Không thêm loai_thung vào product import Excel
- Không migration DB (cột đã có)

## Constraints
- `loai_thung` đã có ở model, schema, frontend type — không cần backend change
- Dùng `LOAI_THUNG_OPTIONS` từ `../../api/quotes` để consistent với QuoteForm
- ProductList form là Ant Design Form, không dùng React state riêng

## Goal
Thêm trường `loai_thung` (optional Select) vào ProductList modal form. handleSave đọc từ form thay vì hardcode null. QuoteForm._applyProductToCI nhận loai_thung từ sản phẩm và auto-fill.

## Criteria
- [ ] ISC-1: `ProductList.tsx` import `LOAI_THUNG_OPTIONS` từ `../../api/quotes`
- [ ] ISC-2: Form có Select loai_thung với allowClear
- [ ] ISC-3: Select có grouped options (Thùng/Hộp/Khay)
- [ ] ISC-4: `handleSave` dùng `vals.loai_thung ?? null` thay vì `null` cứng
- [ ] ISC-5: `openEdit` load đúng loai_thung từ row data (qua `form.setFieldsValue({...row})`)
- [ ] ISC-6: TypeScript compile clean
- [ ] ISC-7: QuoteForm._applyProductToCI nhận loai_thung non-null → boxCalc chạy
- [ ] ISC-8: Khi chọn mã có loai_thung → 3 trường tự tính (Khổ TT, Dài TT, Diện tích)
- [ ] ISC-9: Khi chọn mã không có loai_thung → hành vi cũ (user phải chọn thủ công)
- [ ] ISC-10: Anti: `loai_thung: null` không còn hardcode trong handleSave
- [ ] ISC-11: Anti: import từ quotes.ts không làm circular dependency
- [ ] ISC-12: ProductList form không bị lỗi layout sau khi thêm field mới

## Test Strategy
| isc | type | check | threshold | tool |
|-----|------|-------|-----------|------|
| ISC-1 | code | Grep import LOAI_THUNG_OPTIONS ProductList.tsx | found | Grep |
| ISC-2 | code | Grep allowClear ProductList.tsx trong context loai_thung | found | Grep |
| ISC-3 | code | Grep optionGroupLabel ProductList.tsx | found | Grep |
| ISC-4 | code | Grep vals.loai_thung ProductList.tsx | found | Grep |
| ISC-6 | build | tsc --noEmit | 0 errors | Bash |
| ISC-10 | code | Grep "loai_thung: null" handleSave | not found | Grep |

## Features
| name | satisfies | depends_on | parallelizable |
|------|-----------|------------|----------------|
| Import LOAI_THUNG_OPTIONS | ISC-1 | — | no |
| Add Select UI | ISC-2,3 | ISC-1 | no |
| Fix handleSave | ISC-4,10 | — | yes |
| TypeScript verify | ISC-6,11 | all above | no |

## Decisions
2026-06-02: Delegation floor E3 (soft ≥2) — skipped Forge và Agent vì đây là surgical single-file edit, schema đã biết trước, không có architecture decision. Show-your-math: thêm 1 Select field + 1 import + 1 string thay vì null, tổng ~25 dòng code, risk thấp, context đã đủ.

## Verification
(populated during EXECUTE)

input.new_string:
// Chuyển giá trị loai_thung cũ (text) → code mới cho calcBoxDimensions
  // Dùng startsWith/includes thay vì exact-match để tránh lỗi NFC/NFD encoding
  const normalizeLoaiThung = (v: string | null): string | null => {
    if (!v) return null
    if (v === 'A1' || v.startsWith('A1-')) return 'A1'
    if (v === 'A3' || v.startsWith('A3-')) return 'A3'
    if (v === 'A5_DAY' || v.startsWith('A5_DAY')) return 'A5_DAY'
    if (v === 'A5_NAP' || v.startsWith('A5_NAP')) return 'A5_NAP'
    if (v === 'A5' || v.startsWith('A5-')) return 'A5_DAY'
    if (v === 'A7' || v.startsWith('A7-')) return 'A7'
    if (v === 'GOI_GIUA' || v.includes('i gi')) return 'GOI_GIUA'  // "Gói giữa"
    if (v === 'GOI_SUON' || v.includes('i s')) return 'GOI_SUON'   // "Gói sườn"
    if (v === 'LOT' || v.includes('Tấm') || v.includes('tm') || v.includes('lót')) return 'LOT'
    if (v === 'KHAC') return 'KHAC'
    // Đã là code mới hoặc không xác định → giữ nguyên
    return v
  }

  const normalizeLoaiThung = (v: string | null): string | null => {

    if (v === 'A1' || v.startsWith('A1-')) return 'A1'
    if (v === 'A3' || v.startsWith('A3-')) return 'A3'

input.content:
"""
migrate_htcph.py — Import dữ liệu từ SQL Server HTCPH vào ERP Nam Phương
Chạy: python migrate_htcph.py
- Khách hàng (DMKH → customers)
- Nhà cung cấp (DMNCC → suppliers)
- Hàng hóa (DMHH → products)
- Bỏ qua nếu đã tồn tại (upsert-skip)
"""
import sys, re, os
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor, as_completed
from decimal import Decimal

sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")

# ── Kết nối SQL Server HTCPH ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
import pyodbc

SS_CONN_STR = (
    "DRIVER={ODBC Driver 17 for SQL Server};"
    "SERVER=203.162.54.176,1441;"
    "DATABASE=HTCPH;"
    "UID=duong;"
    "PWD=Namphuong123@;"
    "TrustServerCertificate=yes;"
    "Connection Timeout=20;"
)


def ss_conn():
    return pyodbc.connect(SS_CONN_STR)


# ── Kết nối ERP (SQLAlchemy) ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Chạy từ thư mục gốc project, thêm backend vào path
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), "backend"))
os.chdir(os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), "backend"))

from app.config import settings
from app.database import SessionLocal, engine
from app import models  # noqa — register all models

Session = SessionLocal


# ── Utility ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def parse_dmhh_dims(ma_hh: str):
    """
    Tách D, R, C, so_lop từ MaHH dạng: MaKH_D*R*C_NLop
    VD: 'A&M_32*19*41_3L' → (32, 19, 41, 3)
    Trả về (None,None,None,3) nếu không parse được.
    """
    m = re.search(r"_(\d+\.?\d*)\*(\d+\.?\d*)(?:\*(\d+\.?\d*))?_(\d+)L", ma_hh)
    if m:
        d = Decimal(m.group(1))
        r = Decimal(m.group(2))
        c = Decimal(m.group(3)) if m.group(3) else Decimal("0")
        lop = int(m.group(4))
        return d, r, c, lop
    return None, None, None, 3


def ma_kh_from_ma_hh(ma_hh: str):
    """Lấy mã khách từ MaHH: 'A&M_32*19*41_3L' → 'A&M'"""
    parts = ma_hh.split("_")
    return parts[0] if parts else None


# ── 1. Migrate DMKH → customers ──────────────────────────────────────────────
def migrate_customers():
    con = ss_conn()
    cur = con.cursor()
    cur.execute("""
        SELECT MaKH, TenTat, TenKH, DiaChi, GiaoHang, MST,
               DienThoai, Fax, DaiDien, SDT_LH, NVPT,
               NoTran, soNgayNo, XepLoaiKH, isVIP, GhiChu, isHiden
        FROM DMKH
    """)
    rows = cur.fetchall()
    con.close()

    db = Session()
    try:
        existing = {r[0] for r in db.execute(
            __import__("sqlalchemy").text("SELECT ma_kh FROM customers")
        )}
        new_count = skip_count = 0
        for r in rows:
            ma_kh = (r[0] or "").strip()
            if not ma_kh or ma_kh in existing:
                skip_count += 1
                continue
            obj = models.master.Customer(
                ma_kh=ma_kh,
                ten_viet_tat=(r[1] or ma_kh).strip()[:100],
                ten_don_vi=(r[2] or "").strip() or None,
                dia_chi=(r[3] or "").strip() or None,
                dia_chi_giao_hang=(r[4] or "").strip() or None,
                ma_so_thue=(r[5] or "").strip() or None,
                dien_thoai=(r[6] or "").strip() or None,
                fax=(r[7] or "").strip() or None,
                nguoi_dai_dien=(r[8] or "").strip() or None,
                so_dien_thoai_lh=(r[9] or "").strip() or None,
                no_tran=Decimal(str(r[11])) if r[11] is not None else Decimal("0"),
                so_ngay_no=int(r[12]) if r[12] is not None else 0,
                xep_loai=(r[13] or "").strip() or None,
                la_khach_vip=bool(r[14]),
                ghi_chu=(r[15] or "").strip() or None,
                trang_thai=not bool(r[16]),  # isHiden=True → trang_thai=False
            )
            db.add(obj)
            existing.add(ma_kh)
            new_count += 1
            if new_count % 100 == 0:
                db.flush()
        db.commit()
        return f"Khách hàng: +{new_count} mới, {skip_count} bỏ qua"
    except Exception as e:
        db.rollback()
        raise e
    finally:
        db.close()


# ── 2. Migrate DMNCC → suppliers ─────────────────────────────────────────────
def migrate_suppliers():
    con = ss_conn()
    cur = con.cursor()
    cur.execute("""
        SELECT MaNCC, TenTat, TenNCC, DiaChi, MST,
               DienThoai, Fax, DaiDien, DiDong, PhanLoai, MaNCCAmis
        FROM DMNCC
    """)
    rows = cur.fetchall()
    con.close()

    db = Session()
    try:
        existing = {r[0] for r in db.execute(
            __import__("sqlalchemy").text("SELECT ma_ncc FROM suppliers")
        )}
        new_count = skip_count = 0
        for r in rows:
            ma_ncc = (r[0] or "").strip()
            if not ma_ncc or ma_ncc in existing:
                skip_count += 1
                continue
            obj = models.master.Supplier(
                ma_ncc=ma_ncc,
                ten_viet_tat=(r[1] or ma_ncc).strip()[:100],
                ten_don_vi=(r[2] or "").strip() or None,
                dia_chi=(r[3] or "").strip() or None,
                ma_so_thue=(r[4] or "").strip() or None,
                dien_thoai=(r[5] or "").strip() or None,
                fax=(r[6] or "").strip() or None,
                nguoi_dai_dien=(r[7] or "").strip() or None,
                di_dong=(r[8] or "").strip() or None,
                phan_loai=(r[9] or "").strip() or None,
                ma_ncc_amis=(r[10] or "").strip() or None,
            )
            db.add(obj)
            existing.add(ma_ncc)
            new_count += 1
        db.commit()
        return f"Nhà cung cấp: +{new_count} mới, {skip_count} bỏ qua"
    except Exception as e:
        db.rollback()
        raise e
    finally:
        db.close()


# ── 3. Migrate DMHH → products ───────────────────────────────────────────────
def migrate_products():
    con = ss_conn()
    cur = con.cursor()
    cur.execute("""
        SELECT MaHH, TenHH, DVT, GiaBan, GiaMua, GhiChu, KhongNXT, QuyCach
        FROM DMHH
    """)
    rows = cur.fetchall()
    con.close()

    db = Session()
    try:
        existing = {r[0] for r in db.execute(
            __import__("sqlalchemy").text("SELECT ma_amis FROM products")
        )}
        # Build customer map for FK
        kh_map = {r[0]: r[1] for r in db.execute(
            __import__("sqlalchemy").text("SELECT ma_kh, id FROM customers")
        )}

        new_count = skip_count = 0
        batch = []
        for r in rows:
            ma_hh = (r[0] or "").strip()
            if not ma_hh or ma_hh in existing:
                skip_count += 1
                continue

            ten_hang = (r[1] or ma_hh).strip()[:255] or ma_hh
            dvt = (r[2] or "Thùng").strip()[:20] or "Thùng"
            gia_ban = Decimal(str(r[3])) if r[3] is not None else Decimal("0")
            gia_mua = Decimal(str(r[4])) if r[4] is not None else Decimal("0")
            ghi_chu_parts = []
            if r[5]:
                ghi_chu_parts.append(r[5].strip())
            if r[7]:
                ghi_chu_parts.append(r[7].strip())
            ghi_chu = " | ".join(ghi_chu_parts) or None
            khong_tinh_nxt = bool(r[6])

            d, rong, c, so_lop = parse_dmhh_dims(ma_hh)

            # Customer FK từ prefix mã hàng
            ma_kh_prefix = ma_kh_from_ma_hh(ma_hh)
            ma_kh_id = kh_map.get(ma_kh_prefix)

            obj = models.master.Product(
                ma_amis=ma_hh,
                ma_hang=ma_hh,
                ten_hang=ten_hang,
                dai=d,
                rong=rong,
                cao=c,
                so_lop=so_lop,
                dvt=dvt,
                gia_ban=gia_ban,
                gia_mua=gia_mua,
                ghi_chu=ghi_chu,
                khong_tinh_nxt=khong_tinh_nxt,
                ma_kh_id=ma_kh_id,
            )
            batch.append(obj)
            existing.add(ma_hh)
            new_count += 1
            if len(batch) >= 500:
                db.add_all(batch)
                db.flush()
                batch.clear()
                print(f"  ... {new_count} hàng hóa đã xử lý", flush=True)

        if batch:
            db.add_all(batch)
        db.commit()
        return f"Hàng hóa: +{new_count} mới, {skip_count} bỏ qua"
    except Exception as e:
        db.rollback()
        raise e
    finally:
        db.close()


# ── Main: chạy 3 jobs song song ───────────────────────────────────────────────
if __name__ == "__main__":
    print("=== Migrate HTCPH → ERP Nam Phương ===\n")

    jobs = {
        "customers": migrate_customers,
        "suppliers": migrate_suppliers,
        "products": migrate_products,
    }

    # customers và suppliers trước (products cần customer FK)
    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=2) as exe:
        futures = {
            exe.submit(migrate_customers): "customers",
            exe.submit(migrate_suppliers): "suppliers",
        }
        for f in as_completed(futures):
            name = futures[f]
            try:
                print(f"✓ {f.result()}")
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"✗ {name}: {e}")

    # products sau (cần customer FK map)
    print("\nĐang migrate hàng hóa...")
    try:
        result = migrate_products()
        print(f"✓ {result}")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"✗ products: {e}")

    print("\n=== Hoàn thành ===")

import sys, pyodbc
sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8')
conn = pyodbc.connect('DRIVER={ODBC Driver 17 for SQL Server};SERVER=203.162.54.176,1441;DATABASE=HTCPH;UID=duong;PWD=Namphuong123@;TrustServerCertificate=yes;Connection Timeout=15')
cur = conn.cursor()
# Tìm bảng liên quan đến kết cấu giấy / BOM
cur.execute(\"\"\"SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES 
WHERE TABLE_NAME LIKE '%CTTC%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%KetCau%' 
OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%BOM%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%CauTruc%'
OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%ChiTiet%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%NhapGia%'
ORDER BY TABLE_NAME\"\"\")
print('BOM tables:', [r[0] for r in cur.fetchall()])
# Check DTKH structure
cur.execute('SELECT TOP 1 * FROM DTKH')
print('DTKH cols:', [c[0] for c in cur.description])

SELECT 
  h.MaHH,
  COUNT(DISTINCT dt.DTBGID) as so_bao_gia
FROM DMHH h
JOIN MTBaoGia mb ON mb.MaKH = LEFT(h.MaHH, CHARINDEX(\'_\', h.MaHH) - 1)
JOIN DTBaoGia dt ON dt.MTBGID = mb.MTBGID
  AND ABS(dt.Dai - CAST(PARSENAME(REPLACE(SUBSTRING(h.MaHH, 
    CHARINDEX(\'_\', h.MaHH)+1, 
    LEN(h.MaHH)-CHARINDEX(\'_\', h.MaHH)-2), \'*\', \'.\'), 3) AS FLOAT)) < 0.5
WHERE h.MaHH LIKE \'%_%\_%\'
GROUP BY h.MaHH
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT dt.DTBGID) > 0
ORDER BY so_bao_gia DESC
''')

import sys, pyodbc
sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8')
conn = pyodbc.connect('DRIVER={ODBC Driver 17 for SQL Server};SERVER=203.162.54.176,1441;DATABASE=HTCPH;UID=duong;PWD=Namphuong123@;TrustServerCertificate=yes;Connection Timeout=20')
cur = conn.cursor()

# Lấy toàn bộ DMHH đã parse được dimension
import re
cur.execute('SELECT MaHH FROM DMHH')
products = [r[0] for r in cur.fetchall() if r[0]]

parsed = []
for mhh in products:
    m = re.search(r'^([^_]+)_(\d+\.?\d*)\*(\d+\.?\d*)(?:\*(\d+\.?\d*))?_(\d+)L', mhh)
    if m:
        parsed.append((mhh, m.group(1), float(m.group(2)), float(m.group(3)), 
                       float(m.group(4) or 0), int(m.group(5))))

print(f'DMHH có dims: {len(parsed)}/{len(products)}')

# Lấy DTBaoGia + MTBaoGia join
cur.execute('''
SELECT mb.MaKH, dt.Dai, dt.Rong, dt.Cao, dt.Lop,
       dt.KetCau, dt.Mat_Giay, dt.SB_Giay, dt.MB_Giay, dt.SC_Giay, dt.MC_Giay,
       dt.SE_Giay, dt.ME_Giay,
       dt.Mat_DL, dt.SB_DL, dt.MB_DL, dt.SC_DL, dt.MC_DL,
       dt.isChongTham, dt.LoaiIn, dt.isBoi, dt.isBe, dt.isCanMan,
       mb.NgayCT
FROM DTBaoGia dt
JOIN MTBaoGia mb ON mb.MTBGID = dt.MTBGID
WHERE dt.Dai IS NOT NULL AND dt.Rong IS NOT NULL AND mb.MaKH IS NOT NULL
      AND dt.Mat_Giay IS NOT NULL AND dt.Mat_Giay != \'\'
ORDER BY mb.NgayCT DESC
''')
bg_cols = [c[0] for c in cur.description]
bg_rows = cur.fetchall()
print(f'DTBaoGia có kết cấu: {len(bg_rows)}')

# Build lookup: (MaKH, Dai, Rong, Cao, Lop) → latest row
lookup = {}
for row in reversed(bg_rows):  # reversed = oldest first, latest overwrites
    d = dict(zip(bg_cols, row))
    key = (d['MaKH'], round(d['Dai'] or 0, 1), round(d['Rong'] or 0, 1), 
           round(d['Cao'] or 0, 1), d['Lop'] or 3)
    lookup[key] = d

# Match
matched = 0
for mhh, makh, dai, rong, cao, lop in parsed:
    key = (makh, round(dai, 1), round(rong, 1), round(cao, 1), lop)
    if key in lookup:
        matched += 1

print(f'Products matched: {matched}/{len(parsed)} ({matched*100//len(parsed) if parsed else 0}%)')
conn.close()
" 2>&1
input.description: Test match rate DMHH → DTBaoGia via customer + dimensions

input.content:
"""
migrate_ket_cau.py — Link hàng hóa với kết cấu giấy từ lịch sử báo giá HTCPH

Logic:
  DMHH.MaHH (A&M_32*19*41_3L)
    → MaKH prefix = "A&M"
    → MTBaoGia.MaKH = "A&M" (lấy báo giá gần nhất)
    → DTBaoGia.Dai=32, Rong=19, Cao=41, Lop=3
    → kết cấu giấy + addon

Output:
  1. CauTrucThongDung — populate các kết cấu distinct từ DTBaoGia
  2. Product.so_mau, ghim, dan — update từ DTBaoGia match
"""
import sys, re, os
sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")

import pyodbc
from decimal import Decimal

sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), "backend"))
os.chdir(os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), "backend"))

from app.database import SessionLocal
from app.models.master import CauTrucThongDung, Product
import sqlalchemy as sa

SS_CONN_STR = (
    "DRIVER={ODBC Driver 17 for SQL Server};"
    "SERVER=203.162.54.176,1441;"
    "DATABASE=HTCPH;"
    "UID=duong;"
    "PWD=Namphuong123@;"
    "TrustServerCertificate=yes;"
    "Connection Timeout=20;"
)


def clean(v, maxlen=None):
    if v is None:
        return None
    s = str(v).strip()
    if not s:
        return None
    return s[:maxlen] if maxlen else s


def parse_mhh(mhh: str):
    """
    'A&M_32*19*41_3L' → ('A&M', 32.0, 19.0, 41.0, 3)
    'AAP_120*120_3L'  → ('AAP', 120.0, 120.0, 0.0, 3)
    """
    m = re.search(r'^([^_]+)_(\d+\.?\d*)\*(\d+\.?\d*)(?:\*(\d+\.?\d*))?_(\d+)L', mhh)
    if not m:
        return None
    return (
        m.group(1),
        float(m.group(2)),
        float(m.group(3)),
        float(m.group(4) or 0),
        int(m.group(5)),
    )


def to_hop_song_from_ketcau(lop: int, sb: str, sc: str, se: str) -> str | None:
    """Đoán tổ hợp sóng từ các cột sóng."""
    parts = []
    if sb:
        parts.append("B")
    if sc:
        parts.append("C")
    if se:
        parts.append("E")
    return "".join(parts) or None


# ── Fetch từ SQL Server ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
print("Kết nối SQL Server...")
conn = pyodbc.connect(SS_CONN_STR)
cur = conn.cursor()

# 1. DMHH
cur.execute("SELECT MaHH FROM DMHH WHERE MaHH IS NOT NULL")
all_mahh = [r[0].strip() for r in cur.fetchall() if r[0]]

# 2. DTBaoGia + MTBaoGia — chỉ lấy dòng có kết cấu
cur.execute("""
    SELECT
        mb.MaKH,
        dt.Dai, dt.Rong, dt.Cao, dt.Lop,
        dt.KetCau,
        dt.Mat_Giay,  dt.SB_Giay,  dt.MB_Giay,
        dt.SC_Giay,   dt.MC_Giay,
        dt.SE_Giay,   dt.ME_Giay,
        dt.Mat_DL,    dt.SB_DL,    dt.MB_DL,
        dt.SC_DL,     dt.MC_DL,
        dt.Ghim, dt.Dan, dt.LoaiIn, dt.isBoi, dt.isBe, dt.isCanMan, dt.isChongTham,
        mb.NgayCT
    FROM DTBaoGia dt
    JOIN MTBaoGia mb ON mb.MTBGID = dt.MTBGID
    WHERE dt.Dai IS NOT NULL AND dt.Rong IS NOT NULL
      AND mb.MaKH IS NOT NULL
      AND dt.Mat_Giay IS NOT NULL AND dt.Mat_Giay != ''
    ORDER BY mb.NgayCT ASC
""")
cols = [c[0] for c in cur.description]
bg_rows = [dict(zip(cols, r)) for r in cur.fetchall()]
conn.close()

print(f"DMHH: {len(all_mahh)} | DTBaoGia có kết cấu: {len(bg_rows)}")

# ── Build lookup (MaKH, Dai, Rong, Cao, Lop) → latest DTBaoGia row ──────────
# ORDER BY NgayCT ASC rồi overwrite → key cuối = mới nhất
lookup: dict[tuple, dict] = {}
for row in bg_rows:
    key = (
        (row["MaKH"] or "").strip(),
        round(row["Dai"] or 0, 1),
        round(row["Rong"] or 0, 1),
        round(row["Cao"] or 0, 1),
        int(row["Lop"] or 3),
    )
    lookup[key] = row

# ── Parse DMHH ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
parsed_products: list[tuple] = []  # (MaHH, MaKH, Dai, Rong, Cao, Lop)
for mhh in all_mahh:
    p = parse_mhh(mhh)
    if p:
        parsed_products.append((mhh,) + p)

print(f"DMHH parse được dims: {len(parsed_products)}/{len(all_mahh)}")

# Match
matches: dict[str, dict] = {}  # MaHH → DTBaoGia row
for mhh, makh, dai, rong, cao, lop in parsed_products:
    key = (makh, round(dai, 1), round(rong, 1), round(cao, 1), lop)
    if key in lookup:
        matches[mhh] = lookup[key]

print(f"Matched: {len(matches)}/{len(parsed_products)} ({len(matches)*100//len(parsed_products) if parsed_products else 0}%)")


# ── Step 1: Populate CauTrucThongDung ────────────────────────────────────────
# Dedup bằng (KetCau, so_lop) — lấy 1 record đại diện
unique_cau_truc: dict[tuple, dict] = {}
for mhh, row in matches.items():
    ketcau = clean(row["KetCau"], 100)
    lop = int(row["Lop"] or 3)
    key = (ketcau or "", lop)
    if key not in unique_cau_truc:
        unique_cau_truc[key] = row

print(f"\nCấu trúc distinct: {len(unique_cau_truc)}")

db = SessionLocal()
try:
    existing_ct = {
        (r[0], r[1])
        for r in db.execute(
            sa.text("SELECT ten_cau_truc, so_lop FROM cau_truc_thong_dung")
        )
    }
    ct_new = 0
    for (ketcau_str, lop), row in unique_cau_truc.items():
        if not ketcau_str:
            continue
        if (ketcau_str, lop) in existing_ct:
            continue
        to_hop = to_hop_song_from_ketcau(
            lop,
            row.get("SB_Giay") or "",
            row.get("SC_Giay") or "",
            row.get("SE_Giay") or "",
        )
        obj = CauTrucThongDung(
            ten_cau_truc=ketcau_str,
            so_lop=lop,
            to_hop_song=to_hop,
            mat=clean(row.get("Mat_Giay"), 30),
            mat_dl=Decimal(str(row["Mat_DL"])) if row.get("Mat_DL") else None,
            song_1=clean(row.get("SB_Giay"), 30),
            song_1_dl=Decimal(str(row["SB_DL"])) if row.get("SB_DL") else None,
            mat_1=clean(row.get("MB_Giay"), 30),
            mat_1_dl=Decimal(str(row["MB_DL"])) if row.get("MB_DL") else None,
            song_2=clean(row.get("SC_Giay"), 30),
            song_2_dl=Decimal(str(row["SC_DL"])) if row.get("SC_DL") else None,
            mat_2=clean(row.get("MC_Giay"), 30),
            mat_2_dl=Decimal(str(row["MC_DL"])) if row.get("MC_DL") else None,
            song_3=None,
            song_3_dl=None,
            mat_3=None,
            mat_3_dl=None,
            trang_thai=True,
            thu_tu=ct_new,
        )
        db.add(obj)
        existing_ct.add((ketcau_str, lop))
        ct_new += 1

    db.flush()
    # Reload map: (ten_cau_truc, so_lop) → id
    ct_id_map = {
        (r[0], r[1]): r[2]
        for r in db.execute(
            sa.text("SELECT ten_cau_truc, so_lop, id FROM cau_truc_thong_dung")
        )
    }
    print(f"CauTrucThongDung: +{ct_new} mới")

    # ── Step 2: Update products (so_mau, ghim, dan + ghi_chu KetCau) ─────────
    prod_map = {
        r[0]: r[1]
        for r in db.execute(sa.text("SELECT ma_amis, id FROM products"))
    }

    updated = 0
    for mhh, row in matches.items():
        prod_id = prod_map.get(mhh)
        if not prod_id:
            continue

        loai_in = int(row.get("LoaiIn") or 0)
        ghim = bool(row.get("Ghim"))
        dan = bool(row.get("Dan"))
        ketcau_str = clean(row.get("KetCau"))

        db.execute(
            sa.text("""
                UPDATE products
                SET so_mau = :so_mau,
                    ghim   = :ghim,
                    dan    = :dan,
                    ghi_chu = CASE
                        WHEN ghi_chu IS NULL OR ghi_chu = '' THEN :ketcau
                        ELSE ghi_chu || ' | KetCau: ' || :ketcau
                    END
                WHERE id = :id
            """),
            {
                "so_mau": loai_in,
                "ghim": ghim,
                "dan": dan,
                "ketcau": ketcau_str or "",
                "id": prod_id,
            },
        )
        updated += 1
        if updated % 1000 == 0:
            print(f"  ... {updated} sản phẩm cập nhật")

    db.commit()
    print(f"Products updated: {updated}")
    print("\n=== Hoàn thành ===")

except Exception as e:
    db.rollback()
    raise
finally:
    db.close()

cd "d:\NAM_PHUONG_SOFTWARE\DU LIEU MPS\erp-nam-phuong" && python -c "
import sys, re, os, pyodbc
sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8')
sys.path.insert(0, 'backend'); os.chdir('backend')
from app.database import SessionLocal
import sqlalchemy as sa

# Normalize helpers
def norm_chong_tham(v):
    if not v: return 0
    v = str(v).strip()
    if v in ('Không','0',''): return 0
    if v in ('Trong','1'): return 1
    if v in ('Ngoài','Ngoai','2','2 Mặt'): return 2
    return 0

def norm_can_mang(v):
    return norm_chong_tham(v)

# SQL Server
conn = pyodbc.connect('DRIVER={ODBC Driver 17 for SQL Server};SERVER=203.162.54.176,1441;DATABASE=HTCPH;UID=duong;PWD=Namphuong123@;TrustServerCertificate=yes;Connection Timeout=20')
cur = conn.cursor()
cur.execute('''
    SELECT mb.MaKH, dt.Dai, dt.Rong, dt.Cao, dt.Lop,
           dt.isChongTham, dt.isBoi, dt.isBe, dt.isCanMan, dt.LoaiIn, dt.Ghim, dt.Dan,
           mb.NgayCT
    FROM DTBaoGia dt
    JOIN MTBaoGia mb ON mb.MTBGID = dt.MTBGID
    WHERE dt.Dai IS NOT NULL AND mb.MaKH IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY mb.NgayCT ASC
''')
cols = [c[0] for c in cur.description]
bg_rows = [dict(zip(cols, r)) for r in cur.fetchall()]
conn.close()

# Build lookup latest per (MaKH, D, R, C, Lop)
lookup = {}
for row in bg_rows:
    key = ((row['MaKH'] or '').strip(), round(row['Dai'] or 0,1),
           round(row['Rong'] or 0,1), round(row['Cao'] or 0,1), int(row['Lop'] or 3))
    lookup[key] = row

# Parse products
import re as _re
def parse(mhh):
    m = _re.search(r'^([^_]+)_(\d+\.?\d*)\*(\d+\.?\d*)(?:\*(\d+\.?\d*))?_(\d+)L', mhh)
    if not m: return None
    return m.group(1), float(m.group(2)), float(m.group(3)), float(m.group(4) or 0), int(m.group(5))

db = SessionLocal()
prod_map = {r[0]: r[1] for r in db.execute(sa.text('SELECT ma_amis, id FROM products'))}
updated = 0
for mhh, pid in prod_map.items():
    p = parse(mhh)
    if not p: continue
    key = (p[0], round(p[1],1), round(p[2],1), round(p[3],1), p[4])
    row = lookup.get(key)
    if not row: continue
    db.execute(sa.text('''
        UPDATE products SET
          chong_tham = :ct, boi = :boi, be_so_con = :be, can_mang = :cm
        WHERE id = :id
    '''), {
        'ct':  norm_chong_tham(row['isChongTham']),
        'boi': 1 if row['isBoi'] else 0,
        'be':  int(row['isBe'] or 0),
        'cm':  norm_can_mang(row['isCanMan']),
        'id':  pid,
    })
    updated += 1
    if updated % 2000 == 0:
        db.flush()
        print(f'  {updated} updated...')
db.commit()
print(f'Addon updated: {updated} products')

# Verify
sample = db.execute(sa.text('''
    SELECT ma_amis, so_mau, ghim, dan, chong_tham, boi, be_so_con, can_mang
    FROM products WHERE chong_tham > 0 OR boi > 0 OR be_so_con > 0 OR can_mang > 0
    LIMIT 5
''')).fetchall()
print('Sample:')
for r in sample: print(' ', r)
db.close()
" 2>&1
input.description: Update all 4 missing addon columns from DTBaoGia matches

           mb.NgayCT
    FROM DTBaoGia dt
    JOIN MTBaoGia mb ON mb.MTBGID = dt.MTBGID
    WHERE dt.Dai IS NOT NULL AND mb.MaKH IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY mb.NgayCT ASC
''')
cols = [c[0] for c in cur.description]
bg_rows = [dict(zip(cols, r)) for r in cur.fetchall()]
conn.close()

lookup = {}
for row in bg_rows:
    key = ((row['MaKH'] or '').strip(), round(row['Dai'] or 0,1),
           round(row['Rong'] or 0,1), round(row['Cao'] or 0,1), int(row['Lop'] or 3))
    lookup[key] = row

def parse(mhh):
    m = re.search(r'^([^_]+)_(\d+\.?\d*)\*(\d+\.?\d*)(?:\*(\d+\.?\d*))?_(\d+)L', mhh)
    if not m: return None
    return m.group(1), float(m.group(2)), float(m.group(3)), float(m.group(4) or 0), int(m.group(5))

db = SessionLocal()
prod_map = {r[0]: r[1] for r in db.execute(sa.text('SELECT ma_amis, id FROM products'))}
updated = 0
for mhh, pid in prod_map.items():
    p = parse(mhh)
    if not p: continue
    key = (p[0], round(p[1],1), round(p[2],1), round(p[3],1), p[4])
    row = lookup.get(key)
    if not row: continue
    so_mau = int(row['SoMau'] or 0) if row.get('SoMau') is not None else 0
    if so_mau < 0: so_mau = 0
    loai_in = int(row['LoaiIn'] or 0)
    db.execute(sa.text('''

          so_mau    = :so_mau,
          loai_in   = :loai_in,
          chap_xa   = :chap_xa,
          ghim      = :ghim,
          dan       = :dan,
          chong_tham= :ct,
          boi       = :boi,
          be_so_con = :be,
          can_mang  = :cm
        WHERE id = :id
    '''), {

        'loai_in': loai_in,
        'chap_xa': 1 if row.get('CHAPXA') else 0,
        'ghim':    1 if row.get('Ghim') else 0,
        'dan':     1 if row.get('Dan') else 0,
        'ct':      norm_ct(row.get('isChongTham')),
        'boi':     1 if row.get('isBoi') else 0,
        'be':      int(row.get('isBe') or 0),
        'cm':      norm_ct(row.get('isCanMan')),
        'id':      pid,
    })
    updated += 1
    if updated % 2000 == 0:
        db.flush()
        print(f'  {updated}...')
db.commit()
print(f'Updated: {updated} products')

input.prompt:
Write `d:\NAM_PHUONG_SOFTWARE\DU LIEU MPS\erp-nam-phuong\backend\app\services\htcph_sync.py`.

This is a sync service that pulls product master data from SQL Server HTCPH into the FastAPI ERP.

## Context
- ERP: FastAPI + PostgreSQL, SQLAlchemy
- HTCPH: SQL Server 203.162.54.176,1441, user=duong, pw=Namphuong123@, db=HTCPH
- pyodbc available for SQL Server connection
- Products table has columns: ma_amis (unique), ma_hang, ten_hang, dai, rong, cao, so_lop, so_mau, loai_in, ghim, dan, chap_xa, loai_lan, loai_thung, chong_tham, boi, be_so_con, can_mang, dvt, loai, ma_kh_id, gia_ban, gia_mua, ghi_chu, trang_thai
- CauTrucThongDung table: ten_cau_truc, so_lop, to_hop_song, mat, mat_dl, song_1, song_1_dl, mat_1, mat_1_dl, song_2, song_2_dl, mat_2, mat_2_dl, song_3, song_3_dl, mat_3, mat_3_dl
- ImportLog table: loai_du_lieu, ten_nguoi_import, so_dong_thanh_cong, so_dong_loi, so_dong_bo_qua, trang_thai, chi_tiet_loi, thoi_gian

## What the sync does
1. Connect to HTCPH via pyodbc (run in executor thread — pyodbc is not async)
2. Pull all DMHH: MaHH, TenHH, DVT, GiaBan, GiaMua, KhongNXT, Loai
3. Pull latest DTBaoGia per product via: MTBaoGia.MaKH + DTBaoGia.(Dai,Rong,Cao,Lop) matching DMHH parsed dimensions. Take most recent NgayCT. Columns needed: Mat_Giay, SB_Giay, MB_Giay, SC_Giay, MC_Giay, SE_Giay, ME_Giay, Mat_DL, SB_DL, MB_DL, SC_DL, MC_DL, SoMau, LoaiIn, CHAPXA, Lan, LoaiThung, isChongTham, isBoi, isBe, isCanMan, Ghim, Dan
4. Upsert products: INSERT new ones, UPDATE existing if gia_ban/kết_cấu/addon changed
5. Upsert CauTrucThongDung: insert new distinct paper structures (dedup key: so_lop+mat+song_1+mat_1+song_2+mat_2+song_3+mat_3)
6. Log to import_logs table

## Key logic from previous migration scripts

Parse MaHH: `^([^_]+)_(\d+\.?\d*)\*(\d+\.?\d*)(?:\*(\d+\.?\d*))?_(\d+)L`
- group 1 = MaKH prefix
- groups 2,3,4 = D,R,C dimensions
- group 5 = Lop

Lookup key for DTBaoGia: (MaKH, round(Dai,1), round(Rong,1), round(Cao,1), Lop) → latest row

Normalize functions:
- loai_lan: '+ 0' → 'bang', '+ -' → 'am_duong'
- chong_tham/can_mang: 'Không'→0, 'Trong'→1, 'Ngoài'/'2 Mặt'/'2'→2
- so_mau from SoMau (int, min 0), loai_in from LoaiIn (int)
- chap_xa: bool(CHAPXA) → int 0/1

## Service structure

```python
import asyncio, logging, re
from datetime import datetime
from decimal import Decimal
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor

logger = logging.getLogger("erp.htcph_sync")
_executor = ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=2)

SS_CONN_STR = "DRIVER={ODBC Driver 17 for SQL Server};SERVER=203.162.54.176,1441;DATABASE=HTCPH;UID=duong;PWD=Namphuong123@;TrustServerCertificate=yes;Connection Timeout=20;"

async def sync_products(db: Session) -> dict:
    """Pull DMHH + DTBaoGia from HTCPH, upsert products + CauTrucThongDung. Returns stats dict."""
    loop = asyncio.get_event_loop()
    htcph_data = await loop.run_in_executor(_executor, _fetch_htcph)
    result = await loop.run_in_executor(_executor, _upsert, db, htcph_data)
    return result

def _fetch_htcph() -> dict:
    """Synchronous: connect to SQL Server and pull all needed data."""
    # returns {"dmhh": [...], "bg_lookup": {key: row}}

def _upsert(db, htcph_data) -> dict:
    """Synchronous: upsert products and cau_truc, return stats."""
    # stats = {"new": 0, "updated": 0, "skipped": 0, "errors": 0}

async def run_daily_sync(get_db_func):
    """Background loop: sleep until next 02:00, then sync."""
    while True:
        now = datetime.now()
        next_run = now.replace(hour=2, minute=0, second=0, microsecond=0)
        if next_run <= now:
            next_run = next_run.replace(day=now.day + 1)
        wait_sec = (next_run - now).total_seconds()
        logger.info(f"HTCPH sync: next run in {wait_sec/3600:.1f}h at {next_run}")
        await asyncio.sleep(wait_sec)
        db = next(get_db_func())
        try:
            result = await sync_products(db)
            logger.info(f"HTCPH sync done: {result}")
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"HTCPH sync failed: {e}")
        finally:
            db.close()
```

## Important
- Products.ghim and .dan are PostgreSQL BOOLEAN — pass Python bool, not int
- CauTrucThongDung upsert: skip if same (so_lop, mat, song_1, mat_1, song_2, mat_2, song_3, mat_3) already exists
- Detect changed products by comparing gia_ban (Decimal), mat, song_1, mat_1 from existing DB vs new HTCPH data — only update if something changed
- Write clean production code, no debug prints, use logger
- Imports: use `from app.models.master import Product, CauTrucThongDung, Customer` and `from app.models.import_log import ImportLog`
- DB session is passed in (not created inside service)
- `_upsert` must do db.commit() at end

## Context

## Endpoints

### POST /api/sync-htcph/products

- Returns: {"status": "ok", "result": {new, updated, skipped, errors}}
- On error: return 500 with detail

### GET /api/sync-htcph/logs
- Auth: any logged-in user (Depends(get_current_user))
- Returns last 10 import_logs where loai_du_lieu='htcph_products', ordered by thoi_gian DESC
- Returns list of dicts via .to_dict()

### GET /api/sync-htcph/status  
- Auth: any logged-in user
- Returns last sync info: last run time, result stats from latest import_log
- If no log exists: {"last_sync": null, "status": "never"}

## Router setup
```python

```
